metadata.description: Book authoring workflow skills for Claude Code. Systematize reference analysis, manuscript proofreading, diagram creation, style verification, and structure reorganization.

plugins.name: authorkit
plugins.description: 책 집필 워크플로우 스킬 (한국어, 기본). authorkit-init(초기 설정), authorkit-analyze(분석), authorkit-compare(대조), authorkit-juice(md 변환), authorkit-draft(퇴고), authorkit-diagram(도해 제작), authorkit-review(검증), authorkit-restructure(구조 재배치)를 지원합니다.

plugins.name: authorkit-en
plugins.description: Book authoring workflow skills (English). authorkit-init(setup), authorkit-analyze(analysis), authorkit-compare(cross-reference), authorkit-juice(to markdown), authorkit-draft(proofreading), authorkit-diagram(text block diagrams), authorkit-review(verification), authorkit-restructure(reorganization).
